confirmDelete.title: Delete reading
confirmDelete.messageBefore: Are you sure you want to delete

deviceSetup.title: Device setup
deviceSetup.rotateConfirmText: Generating a new secret will invalidate the current one. Update your device configuration afterwards.

deviceDetails.title: Device details
deviceDetails.description: This modal shows device setup information, generated identifiers, enabled sensors, whether a water pump is linked with this device, and the account secret used by the device. You can also send an email with sample Arduino code that matches the selected device settings, including sensors and water pump configuration. The generated code is populated with this device’s dedicated Device Key and Auth Secret Key. The Auth Secret Key can be reset later from FAB → Device setup.

wateringSchedule.title: Schedule watering
wateringSchedule.description: Manual watering works by creating a pending pump job for this device. The mobile app does not run the pump directly. Instead, the backend stores the scheduled job, and the Arduino board checks for pending jobs when it sends its next reading. If a pending job exists and the board has pump-control logic, it can start the water pump and then mark the job as executed.
wateringSchedule.pendingJob: A watering job is currently scheduled and waiting for the device to pick it up.
wateringSchedule.noPendingJob: There is no pending watering job for this device.
wateringSchedule.step1: When you schedule watering, the backend stores a pending pump job for this device.
wateringSchedule.step2: The Arduino board normally sends readings about once per hour. During that request, it can also ask the backend whether a pump job is waiting.
wateringSchedule.step3: If the board has pump-control logic and finds a pending job, it can start the pump and then report that the job was executed.
wateringSchedule.step4: Manual scheduled watering is independent from automatic moisture-based watering. It does not check the current soil moisture level before running.
wateringSchedule.pumpRequiredText: This device is not configured with a water pump. Enable water pump support in the device settings before scheduling watering.

export.title: Send readings export
export.noticeTitle: The Excel export will use the currently applied criteria.
export.noticeFiltered: Only readings data matching the filters shown below will be included. If you need different data, change the filters first and then send again.
export.noticeAllData: No filters are currently applied, so the export will include all available readings data for this screen.

upsert.noPlantsText: You don’t have any plants yet. Please add a plant first to link a device.
upsert.moistAlertLabel: Send alerts when soil moisture is beneath threshold
upsert.notificationsSoilMoistureInfo: Soil moisture alerts are available only when the Soil Moisture sensor is enabled.
upsert.sendEmailNotifications: Send email notifications when soil moisture is beneath threshold
upsert.sendPushNotifications: Send push notifications when soil moisture is beneath threshold
upsert.pumpIncluded: Include water pump with this device
upsert.automaticPumpLaunch: Automatic pump launch when soil moisture is beneath threshold
upsert.wateringNotificationsInfo: Watering completion notifications are available only when this device has an included water pump. They can be sent after scheduled watering completes or after automatic watering is triggered and completed.
upsert.sendEmailWateringNotifications: Send email notification when watering is complete
upsert.sendPushWateringNotifications: Send push notification when watering is complete
